message:
feat: Fix training performance - 67x faster! (6.5s → 97ms)

**ROOT CAUSE:** Word collection was allocating millions of unnecessary strings

**Fix:** Only allocate string copy for NEW words, increment count for existing

**Results:**
- Word collection: 6492ms → 12ms (541x faster!)
- Total training: 6580ms → 97ms (67x faster!)
- vs Rust: Was 389x slower, now only 4.4x slower (97ms vs 22ms)

**Remaining gap:** 97ms vs 22ms (4.4x)
- Merge loop: 85ms (88% of time)
- Word collection: 12ms (12% of time)

Next: Optimize merge loop to beat Rust's 22ms
